calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gadi Zohar for and with (executor/petitioner) Maricela Leon-Barrera and specially appearing for Jeffrew Low for and with (beneficiary) Luis Leon. William McDevitt & Charlie Litchfield for (beneficiary) Jose Leon. Elvira Lopez (beneficiary) also present.

Mr. McDevitt reported that the parties went to mediation, it was approved by the court, their client has given them an attorney's lien and that notice of this hearing had been given several times. Mr. Zohar expressed concern regarding the order for distribution of assets, stated that no one is contesting distribution, and that they need to comply with the courts order regarding the distribution of $233,000.00 to Jose Leon. Mr. McDevitt stated that the distribution should be directed to him and it will be deposited into his trust account for distribution. Mr. Zohar submitted an amended order and indicated that the financing is contingent on the order being signed today. The parties expressed urgency in obtaining the signed order for the purpose of financing. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Park. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Loew for and with Luis Arturo Leon. Gadi Zohar for and with Maricela Leon-Barrera. Charles Litchfield for Jose Leon.

Counsel presented oral argument in support of their positions with regard to the Court allowing the Madrid property to be included in the settlement agreement. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary, and the Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement were taken under submission. The Petition for Instructions was taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement; Admission Of Will Into Probate Subject To Terms Of Settlement Agreement.
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Continued To Feb-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gadi Zohar for and with Maricela Leon-Barrera (Special Administrator). Jeffrey Lowe for and with Luis Leon. William McDevitt and Charles Litchfield for and with Jose Leon (Respondent).

Mr. McDevitt stated that he is in favor of probate of the will that the Decedent made but not in favor of a will that was constructed after. Mr. Lowe stated that it was more prudent to delay admitting of the will into probate. Mr. McDevitt also requested that a neutral Administrator be appointed which Mr. Zohar objected to. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 14, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 14, 2014. The Petition for Probate of Will and the Petition for Instructions were continued to and the Parties are to return on February 24, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation. Mr. Zohar is to file an ex parte petition to extend the special letters to February 24, 2014. The Parties also stipulated to general powers so that time on the creditor's claims can commence and to the Special Administrator paying the property taxes.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Continued To Feb-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Nov-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Nov-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Continued To Aug-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gadi Zohar for and with Maricela Leon-Barrera. James Nevin, Sr. for and with Jose Leon, Jr. (Beneficiary).

Mr. Nevin requested a continuance stating that they will pursue a series of actions, that they object to the appointment of Maricela (Petitioner), that there is a potential of malpractice, potential of fraud and that the may file a will contest. Mr. Zohar requested temporary letters so that his Client could deposit rents from a property in Mexico into an Estate account. The Court advised Mr. Zohar that he could file an ex parte petition for temporary letters. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to August 26, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of objections.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
